zh.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin於1544年出生在英國諾福爾可布林頓。他於大約1567年與Joan在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1602年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可布林頓被列為husbandman。他埋葬在英國諾福爾可布林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin于1544年出生在英国諾福爾可布林頓。他于大约1567年与Joan在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1602年在英国英格兰諾福爾可布林頓被列为husbandman。他埋葬在英国諾福爾可布林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Goodwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Godwin (Old English Gōdwine). Compare Godwin .
Irish: adopted in Mayo for Ó Goidín, a variant of Ó Godáin, ‘descendant of Godán’, a diminutive personal name from got ‘stammering, lisping’.

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. William Goodwin was one of the founders of Hartford, CT, in 1635 (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker).

variants.name: Goodwyn
meanings: English (East Anglia and Middlesex): variant of   Goodwin  .

variants.name: Godwin
meanings: from the common Old English personal name Godwine, a compound of god ‘god’ + wine ‘friend, protector, lord’, which survived the Conquest. Compare Goodwin , with which it has most probably been confused.
alternatively, the name may occasionally derive from an Old English female personal name Godwynn.

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin was born in 1544, in Hemblington, Norfolk, England. He married Joan about 1567, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. In 1602, at the age of 58, his occupation is listed as husbandman in Hemblington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He was buried in Hemblington, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin est né en 1544, à Hemblington, Norfolk, Angleterre. Il a épousé Joan environ 1567, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. En 1602, à l’âge de 58 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est husbandman à Hemblington, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ilenterré à Hemblington, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin wurde 1544 in Hemblington, Norfolk, England geboren. Er hat um 1567 in Norfolk, England Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1602, als er 58 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als husbandman in Hemblington, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er wurde in Hemblington, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin è nato il nel 1544 nel Hemblington, Norfolk, England. Lui sposato Joan circa 1567, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1602, all'età di 58 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come husbandman nel Hemblington, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Fu sepolto a Hemblington, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwinは1544年にイギリスノーフォルクヘンブリントンで生まれた。約1567年にイギリスノーフォルクでJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1602年，58歳の時，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘンブリントンでの職業はhusbandmanと記録されている。彼はイギリスノーフォルクヘンブリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin(은)는 1544년 영국 노르폴크 헤블링턴에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1567년 영국 노르폴크에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1602년, 58세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤블링턴에서 husbandman이었다. 그는 영국 노르폴크 헤블링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin nasceu em 1544, em Hemblington, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Joan aproximadamente 1567, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1602, com 58 anos, sua profissão aparece como husbandman em Hemblington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele foi sepultado em Hemblington, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin родился в 1544 г. в местности хемблингтон, норфолк, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1567 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1602 году, в возрасте 58 лет,  он работал по профессии husbandman в местности хемблингтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он был похоронен в местности хемблингтон, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Francis Goodwin nació en 1544, en Hemblington, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Joan aproximadamente 1567, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1602, a la edad de 58 años, su ocupación registrada era husbandman en Hemblington, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fue sepultado en Hemblington, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
